form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run in a small field at Antalya on April 2 over 2000m, 3 len behind Alone Alone carrying 58kg at $5.10. The run before that won by 1.3 len at this track March 22 over 2000m defeating Gorkem Kaptan carrying 55kg at $14. Hard to beat if he brings his A-game.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on March 23 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Ismetim with 55kg at $2.90. form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last in a small field at this track on March 22 over 2000m, 22 len behind Bandolero with 56kg at $23.65. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months scored a big 6 len win at this track March 28 over 2000m defeating Best Alya with 56.5kg at $1.65. Previously second-up won by 2.5 len at this track October 26 over 1900m defeating Black Stone carrying 58kg at $1.80. Clearly the one to beat again. Improver with winning prospects.
